task_goal: Delete the file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg from the Android filesystem located in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area.
task_goal_rewrite: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is deleted from the Pictures folder within the shared external storage (canonically accessible as /sdcard) of the Android device.

checkpoints.description: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is located and selected in the Pictures folder of the Android device's shared external storage (labeled as sdk_gphone_x86_64 or equivalent ABI-specific storage label).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg selected in the Pictures folder of the device's storage, confirming the target file exists and is ready for deletion.

checkpoints.description: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is no longer present in the Pictures folder of the Android device's shared external storage.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace displaying the contents of the Pictures folder without the file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg, or a system-generated confirmation message indicating successful deletion of the file.

checkpoints.description: Evidence confirms the operation was applied to the exact target object/value and intended context stated in the goal.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Use screenshot/UI text/action evidence to disambiguate the target identity and location before final-state verification.

success_rule: Success is confirmed when both required checkpoints are satisfied: the correct target file was identified and selected for deletion, and the file is no longer present in the specified Pictures folder.
